revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-4-035

No English Term

The mechanism which rotates the optic or revolving screen in a flashing or occulting light.


Note: The terms Lens Clock and, in French, Machine de Rotation a Poids refer to such a mechanism when driven by a falling weight.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig10.jpg|400px|border]]

{{IALAFooter}}
